description_long: This is a lifelike white rabbit with a soft, dense fur coat and subtle shading that gives it a natural appearance. Its ears are tall and upright, with a slight inward tilt, and the inner ear areas are tinged with a faint pink hue. The rabbit's eyes are a striking pinkish-red, standing out against its pale fur, and its nose and mouth are delicately detailed. There are a few dark gray patches on its body, most notably on the right side and near the shoulder, adding visual interest to its otherwise white coat. The rabbit is depicted in a crouched, alert posture, with its hind legs tucked under and front legs slightly bent, ready to move. Its small, rounded tail is visible from the rear, completing the realistic representation.
description: A realistic white rabbit with upright ears, pinkish-red eyes, and subtle gray patches on its fur, shown in a crouched, alert posture.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the rabbit's upright ears, pinkish-red eyes, and a prominent dark patch on its right shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rabbit's smooth white fur, bent legs, and the full profile of its head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back, small visible tail, and the symmetrical placement of the ears.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rabbit's face, upright ears, and a large dark patch on the right side of its body.
attribute_ear_orientation: Both ears are upright and slightly tilted inward, with the left ear more vertical and the right ear showing a subtle inward lean.
attribute_fur_pattern: The fur is predominantly white with a few distinct dark gray patches, especially on the right shoulder and side. The coloration is mostly uniform except for these patches.
attribute_tail_visibility: visible; small, rounded, and positioned at the base of the back.
attribute_leg_posture: The legs are bent and tucked under the body in a crouched, alert posture, with the front legs slightly forward and the hind legs ready to spring.
